ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the life expectancy data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy value */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the life expectancy data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the life expectancy data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the life expectancy data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a leap year */,
  "num_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import */,
  "import_size" TEXT /* Size of the imported data in bytes */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the visualization is the default visualization for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
